title: MAGEB16 as an epigenetic timing regulator linking X-chromosome biology to neurodevelopmental vulnerability in Autism Spectrum Disorder.
abstract: Integrative review synthesizing MAGEB16's promoter DNA-methylation switch, interaction networks, and methylation-dependent regulation. Proposes MAGEB16 as dosage- and timing-dependent regulator of early lineage commitment in X-chromosome-enriched developmental periods. Uses depletion datasets, perinatal cord-blood methylome data, peripheral transcriptomics.
